rule_text: Lisraya communications must follow the core brand voice principles: Confident, not boastful (state first-of-its-kind significance directly, never sensationalized); Warm, not overly emotional (genuine empathy about DM's daily impact); and Clear, not complicated (plain, respectful language). Tone may flex slightly by context, but core voice never changes.
intent: Maintain consistent, patient-centered brand voice and tone across all communications.
summary: Lisraya voice: confident (first-of-its-kind, not boastful), warm (genuine empathy, not overly emotional), clear (plain language), tone flexes slightly but core voice constant.
